name: court-case
description: Strict mode for sensitive legal work — extra careful with changes, no deletions, full audit trail

auto_approve.reason: Arbiter management tools are always allowed

always_ask.reason: Creating or overwriting files — need explicit approval for legal work
Modifying files — verifying before any changes to legal documents
Running a command — checking with you first in legal context
Editing a notebook — confirming in legal context
Sending a message — double-checking before sharing anything

deny.reason: No deletions allowed during court case work — too risky to lose evidence
No pushing or resetting git history during legal work

behavior_notes: Extra caution with all file operations
Never delete anything — legal evidence must be preserved
Always explain what you're about to do and why
Ask before sharing, sending, or publishing anything
